name: Staff Performance — Your A-Players vs Your D-Players
description: 6-step demo of the A-D staff grading system showing GMs and managers exactly who's carrying the bar and who's costing them money.

steps.title: Every Employee, Graded A Through D
steps.annotation: CoreTAP grades every bartender, server, and barback A through D based on revenue per hour, voids, comps, ticket size, and shift quality. No more gut-feel performance reviews — actual data, every shift.
steps.screen_hint: Capture the Staff Performance landing page with the A-D grading legend visible.

steps.title: The Grading Grid — At-a-Glance Hierarchy
steps.annotation: Every employee at [BAR_NAME] in a single grid, sorted by grade. A-players in green at the top, D-players in red at the bottom. You'll know in 5 seconds who to invest in and who to coach out.
steps.screen_hint: Zoom on the grading grid with multiple employees visible, color-coded A/B/C/D, sorted by grade.

steps.title: Top Performer Highlight
steps.annotation: Click into your top A-player and see exactly what they do differently — bigger tickets, faster turn time, better upsell rate. Then use that as a coaching template for the rest of the team.
steps.screen_hint: Highlight a single top-performer's profile card with their key metrics breakdown.

steps.title: Underperformer Flag — Coaching, Not Firing
steps.annotation: D-grades aren't a death sentence. CoreTAP flags the specific behaviors dragging an employee down — slow turn, low upsell, high void rate — so you can coach the fix instead of guessing what's wrong.
steps.screen_hint: Show a D-grade employee profile with the specific underperformance reasons listed (e.g. 'Avg ticket 22% below team', 'Void rate 3.4x team avg').

steps.title: 30-Day Performance Trend
steps.annotation: Grades aren't a snapshot — they're a trend. See whether [BAR_NAME]'s staff are improving, plateauing, or sliding over the last 30 days. Catch a B-player slipping toward C before it costs you a Friday night.
steps.screen_hint: Zoom on the 30-day trend chart for a single employee showing grade trajectory over time.

steps.title: Your A-Players Make You 3x More Than Your D-Players
steps.annotation: Across the bars CoreTAP runs in, A-grade employees generate 3x the revenue per hour of D-grade employees. That gap is the single biggest unrecognized lever in [BAR_NAME] right now. Want the grading running on your team this week?
steps.screen_hint: Closing popup with the '3x' insight prominently shown plus a lead-capture form for the export-CSV trial.
steps.cta_label: Grade My Team Free for 14 Days

final_cta_label: Grade My Team Free for 14 Days
